# Mitanshu Goel

Robotics and Physical AI engineer based in Delhi, India. Builds real-time
robot control, robot-learning data pipelines, and LLM and ML systems. His
projects report held-out evaluations, and several document a bug or inflated
metric he caught in his own work.

## Core Profile

- Full name: Mitanshu Goel
- Role: Robotics and Physical AI engineer (also open to ML engineering and
  research engineering roles)
- Location: Delhi, India. Open to roles anywhere in India and India-friendly remote.
- Email: mitanshug2004@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mitanshugoel
- Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/mitanshugoel
- Education: B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering, minor in AI/ML,
  Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (MAIT), Delhi, 2022 to 2026. CGPA 8.01/10.

## Professional Experience

### Nferent AI, Robotics SWE and Physical AI Intern (Mar to Jun 2026, Gurugram)
- Built a bimanual VR teleoperation stack: a Meta Quest 3 drives two Elite
  Robots CS66 arms through a per-arm real-time C++ control loop, with an
  anchor-and-clutch model so the operator can re-grip without the arm jumping.
  Demo video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kUlfE-U_5m4
- Extended the teleoperation to a Franka Research 3 behind a layered safety
  stack, and recorded a 10-task, 51-episode imitation-learning dataset
  (about 2.1 hours of dual RGB-D video with synchronized robot state,
  exported to LeRobot format).
- Wrote control software for a Tesollo DG-5F five-finger dexterous hand
  (20 motors over Modbus-TCP) that plays Rock-Paper-Scissors using a
  RealSense camera and a MediaPipe gesture classifier.
- Built a multi-sensor capture tool that records two MANUS gloves and three
  RealSense cameras on one hardware clock (measured sync error under 15 ms
  at p95), with a frame-uniqueness watchdog that rejects episodes containing
  silently repeated camera frames.
- Demo videos of all this work: https://mitanshu.me/gallery

### SarthakAI, AI Intern (Jun to Aug 2025, Delhi)
- Turned a UBTech Yanshee humanoid into a voice and vision assistant: a
  custom-trained YOLOv8 package detector over the robot's camera stream and
  a NeMo ASR wake-word and command pipeline. Demo video at
  https://mitanshu.me/sarthakai
- Built a sensor-network workstation and a vision-driven sorting line on a
  robotic arm and conveyor.

### Nextup Robotics, Robotics Intern (Jul to Sep 2024, Ghaziabad)
- MoveIt motion planning for a 6-DOF arm, validated in simulation then on
  hardware. Resolved sim-to-real URDF kinematic mismatches.

### A.T.O.M. Robotics, Core Member (Oct 2023 to present, MAIT Delhi)
- Team hexapod (18-DoF, ROS 2): the tripod-gait and analytic
  inverse-kinematics node, the ros2_control hardware interface, and launch
  wiring. https://github.com/atom-robotics-lab/Hexapod
- A web-controlled robotic arm over rosbridge with a live camera feed.

## Key Projects

### Reddit LLM Training
Three language models on a self-scraped Reddit corpus: a 51M-parameter GPT
trained from scratch, a LoRA adapter on Mistral 7B, and a QLoRA adapter on
Qwen 2.5 through a hand-written distributed training loop with token-offset
sharding and resume-by-token-count across free cloud sessions. Held-out
perplexity eval: the from-scratch model reaches 16.85 against 24.68 for
GPT-2; the half-trained Mistral adapter is slightly worse than its base and
is reported that way.
Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/reddit-llm-training
Models: https://huggingface.co/mitanshugoel

### RAG Assistant
Grounded policy Q&A where hallucinations fail at parse time: a Pydantic
model-validator rejects any "fully answered" response with empty citations.
0 hallucinations on a 9-question held-out rubric.
Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/RAG-assistant

### MiniRag-Reranker
Hybrid retrieval (dense plus BM25 plus a learned reranker) over industrial
safety PDFs. He caught that the original eval reused training questions,
rebuilt it around a disjoint held-out set, and reported that the learned
reranker does not clearly beat the hybrid baseline.
Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/MiniRag-Reranker

### Memory Assistant
Local-first personal memory store: a 4-bit Phi-3 generates metadata at
ingest, hybrid dense and keyword search, and a retrieval-backed ask endpoint.
Live demo: https://memory-assistant-psi.vercel.app
Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/memory-assistant

### Darwin Studio
Image generation treated like evolution: SDXL latents as genetic material
with a custom moment-preserving SLERP crossover and a hand-written diffusion
loop. Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/Darwin-Studio

### Churn Survival Model
Cox proportional-hazards churn study on about 10,000 Steam reviews with
LLM-extracted risk signals. The contribution is a leakage decomposition that
cut a headline +0.26 C-index lift to a defensible +0.14, guarded by a
contract test. Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/llm-survival-churn

### Store Performance Dashboard
Retail forecasting over 163 stores judged against a persistence baseline on
a temporal holdout: RMSE 0.158 versus 0.160, reported at exactly that margin.
Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/Store-Performance-Dashboard

### Primetrade Analysis
A trading-signal study whose headline is an honest post-mortem: the next-day
classifier landed at the base rate and the project was stopped rather than
tuned. Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/Primetrade-Analysis

### StockMetrics
Fundamentals-versus-returns study across the big 5 Indian IT firms with FDR
correction, leave-one-out CV, and permutation tests. The finding is an honest
null, made credible by a positive control (inter-firm co-movement r 0.84 to
0.94). Repo: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004/StockMetrics

## Technical Stack

- Robotics: ROS 2 Humble, ros2_control, MoveIt, RViz, Gazebo, real-time C++
  control loops, Cartesian servoing, inverse kinematics, SE(3) transforms,
  VR teleoperation (Quest 3, OpenVR), RealSense RGB-D, multi-camera sync,
  LeRobot datasets, Elite Robots CS SDK, Franka libfranka
- AI and ML: PyTorch, Unsloth, TRL, PEFT, LoRA and rsLoRA, accelerate DDP,
  Hugging Face Hub, YOLOv8, NVIDIA NeMo, SDXL and Diffusers, llama.cpp,
  Sentence-Transformers, ChromaDB
- Data science: lifelines (Cox PH), scikit-learn, XGBoost, statsmodels,
  NDCG, MRR, Recall@k
- Backend and web: FastAPI, SQLite FTS5, BM25, Next.js, React, TypeScript
- Languages: Python, C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Bash

## Contact

Email: mitanshug2004@gmail.com
Available for full-time roles now. Physical AI, Robotics SWE, ML
Engineering, or Research Engineering.
